phase_description: Flight dispatch and check-in systems crashed; airlines detected BSOD across workstations
Emergency IT teams deployed; manual check-in and paper-based boarding initiated
Core reservation and dispatch systems restored for most carriers
Most carriers restored operations; Delta still managing multi-day backlog
Full pre-incident operational capacity restored (Delta approx 5 days)
Clinical staff reported BSOD on workstations; EHR systems inaccessible
Paper-based fallback activated; elective procedures cancelled as precaution
Critical systems (ICU / emergency) restored at most facilities
Most clinical workflows back online; imaging and scheduling recovering
Full system restoration including PACS imaging and patient records
Customers reported failed transactions; bank staff detected BSOD at teller stations
Backup systems and manual overrides activated; ATM networks rerouted
Core transaction processing restored; online banking partially accessible
Most services operational; end-of-day batch processing resumed
Full pre-incident capacity restored for most institutions
911 dispatch centers and government IT offices reported widespread outages
Manual and backup protocols activated; priority given to emergency services
Emergency dispatch and critical government systems restored
Most government services back online; non-critical still recovering
Full operational capacity across all government services
POS terminal failures reported; hotel booking and reservation systems down
Stores switched to manual and cash-only operations; temporary booking holds
Most POS systems restored; online booking recovering
Normal operations resumed for most retailers and hospitality chains
Full pre-incident operational capacity restored
Live broadcast disruptions detected (Sky News went off-air globally)
Backup broadcasting and streaming systems engaged
Most media operations restored on backup infrastructure
Normal broadcasting and content production restored
Full pre-incident capacity restored across studios and digital platforms
